---
title: "5e: BLAST Enrichment Analysis"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

## Summary

BLAST-based enrichment analysis compares pangenome representative sequences
against external databases (e.g., VFDB virulence factor database) to identify
functionally relevant genes.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import os

df = pd.read_csv("../output/data/5e_blast_summary.csv")
for _, row in df.iterrows():
    print(f"{row['metric']}: {row['value']}")
```

## VFDB Enrichment Results

Pangenome representative protein sequences searched against VFDB
(Virulence Factor Database) using blastp with e-value < 1e-5 and
identity > 80%.

```{python}
vfdb_path = "../output/data/5e_vfdb_blast_results.csv"
if os.path.exists(vfdb_path):
    vfdb = pd.read_csv(vfdb_path)
    print(f"Total VFDB hits: {len(vfdb)}")
    print(f"Unique query genes: {vfdb['query'].nunique()}")
    print(f"Unique VFDB targets: {vfdb['target'].nunique()}")
else:
    print("VFDB results not available (VFDB database not downloaded).")
```

```{python}
if os.path.exists(vfdb_path):
    vfdb[['query', 'target', 'identity', 'e_val', 'bitscore']].head(20)
```

## Custom Queries

A pangenome BLAST database was created from the representative sequences.
To search custom protein sequences against the pangenome:

```
blastp -query your_query.fa -db data/external/PangenomeDB/PangenomeDB -outfmt 6
```
